# balena_service_label (Resource)

Manages a label on a Balena service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "balena_service_label" "restart_policy" {
  service_id = 123456
  label_name = "io.balena.features.supervisor-api"
  value      = "true"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `label_name` (String) Label name.
- `service_id` (Number) ID of the service.
- `value` (String) Label value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier.
